title: VidTube
description: A video hosting platform inspired by YouTube. Built to handle complex data operations and video streaming features.
features: Mastered MongoDB Aggregation Pipelines for advanced data fetching
Video upload and management with Cloudinary integration
Dynamic search and channel statistics dashboard

title: Let's Talk
description: A real-time web chat application focused on low-latency communication and instant messaging.
features: Clean and responsive UI for seamless user experience
